case_title: JOSEPH LEE et al VS. NARANJIBHAI R PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS NARANJIBHAI PATEL AND INDIRABEN PATEL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 23, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN 4PM ON OCTOBER 16, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE TO BE ON OR BEFORE JAN-24-2013. SANCTIONS OF $1372.50 IMPOSED JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS NARANJIBHAI PATEL AND INDIRABEN PATEL'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITIONS OF PLAINTIFFF AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS [CCP 2023, 2025] IS GRANTED, DEPOSIT WILL OCCUR AT DIFFERENT TIME. JAMES SIMONS AT 9:30AM ON JAN. 29, 2013; JOSEPH LEE AT 1:30PM ON JAN 29, 2013; DEBRA BROOKS AT 9:30AM & WEYLON ARTRIP AT 1:30PM NO LATER THAN FEB. 12, 2013 EXCEPT MEDICAL EMERGENCY; PLAINTIFF WILL PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NOT LATER THAN TWO DAYS PRIOR TO THE DEPOSITION DATE. FURTHER MORE PLAINTIFFS CLAYVON JOHNSON AND TIANI CROSS ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR THEIR DEPOSITIONS WITHIN 30 DAYS. DEFENDANTS ARE AWARDED SANCTIONS $200 PLAINTIFF CLAYVON JOHNSON AND $200 SANCTIONS AGAINST TIANI CROSS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.
